```
a²b(a - b) + b²c(b - c) + c²a(c - a) = (a - b)(b - c)(a - c)(a + b + c) + (a - b)(b - c)(a - c)(a + b + c) - (a - b)(b - c)(a - c)(a + b + c) + a²b(a - b) + b²c(b - c) + c²a(c - a)
```

Expand the right side:

First compute `(a - b)(b - c)(a - c)`:
